headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex, not immediate P&L impact) — JSW Energy commissions green hydrogen plant, signaling incremental ESG alignment but limited immediate impact
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD reporting; no current penalty or deadline risk.
No immediate P/E or margin impact; green premium possible if scaled.
Potential for lower cost of capital in future; no current bond spread impact.
